sourceNotes: Popular source-backed confidence pass Y 2026-06-02: Greek Island Buses directly matches Agia Kyriaki at approx. 37.533N/25.216E and supports a small undeveloped mixed sand/fine-pebble beach with rocky margins, no facilities, no bus service, local/unpaved final-access risk and limited informal parking; Greece.com and Tinos Guide support Agia Kyriaki as a Tinos beach identity/location. Promoted to high for static metadata only; access changed from asphalt road to passable local/dirt road, accommodation amenity was removed, and terrain was corrected to sand/pebbles/rocks. Source calm/shelter/wind wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring, or live calm/protected/safe claims.

Tier-2 OSM-resort addition 2026-06-12 (batch-approved): an OSM beach_resort sits on the pin; semi-organized with sunbeds, umbrellas and the Ziba Beach Bar confirmed at source (greeka.com/cyclades/tinos/beaches + tripadvisor 2026); south-coast sandy beach, good on windy (meltemi) days.

Source wind/shelter wording and traveler-review wind wording were not imported into windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claims.
